outcomes.label: Above consensus (hot)
outcomes.rationale: Hotter inflation → higher-for-longer rates; risk assets sell off, USD firms.

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: In-line print; muted, mechanical reaction.

outcomes.label: Below consensus (cool)
outcomes.rationale: Softer inflation → rate-cut hopes; risk rallies, USD eases.

outcomes.label: Strong payrolls
outcomes.rationale: Strong labor market: yields & USD up on a hawkish Fed; equities firm on growth.

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: In-line jobs; limited reaction.

outcomes.label: Weak payrolls
outcomes.rationale: Weak jobs: growth worry; yields & USD fall, equities slip, gold bid.

outcomes.label: Beat & raise
outcomes.rationale: NVDA tops estimates / lifts guidance — stock gaps up, modest index lift.

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: Results roughly in line; reaction driven by guidance nuance.

outcomes.label: Miss / soft guide
outcomes.rationale: NVDA disappoints — stock sells off, small index drag.
